channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Mojtaba Khamenei chosen as Iran’s new supreme leader; oil prices soar past $100 a barrel - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Middle East crisis live: Mojtaba Khamenei chosen as Iran’s new supreme leader; oil prices soar past $100 a barrel  The Guardian
  2. Iran Live Updates: Khamenei's Son Named Supreme Leader as Fighting Escalates Across Middle East  The New York Times
  3. Iran's new supreme leader and the AI threat to white-collar jobs: Morning Rundown  NBC News
  4. Iran's choice of Mojtaba Khamenei appears to close path to swift end to war  Reuters
  5. ‘The Most Dangerous Man in the World’  The Atlantic

item.description:
1. Scoop: U.S. dismayed by Israel's Iran fuel strikes, sources say  Axios

item.description:
1. Live. Oil prices soar as Iran launches more attacks across the region  Euronews.com

item.title: Kids' willpower is no match for fast food and screens. Try this instead - NPR
